headline: DICK'S Sporting Goods and Synchrony Level Up the DICK'S Credit Card, Offering Members 10% Back in ScoreCard Rewards on Qualifying Purchases
summary: Today, Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) and DICK'S Sporting Goods (NYSE: DKS) announced the relaunch of their credit card program. The new DICK'S Credit Card program features a new everyday 10% back in rewards* on qualifying purchases at DICK'S, offering one of the most competitive earn rates in retail.
